input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule IC.8.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ic.8.2
            TITLE: batteries

            rule IC.8.2: Batteries
IC.8.2 Batteries  
Refer to T.9.2 for specific requirements of Low Voltage batteries

final_answer: rule IC.8.2: Batteries IC.8.2 Batteries Refer to T.9.2 for specific requirements of Low Voltage batteries
